info.title: Klabis Orienteering Club Management API
info.description:
RESTful API for managing orienteering club operations.

## Features
- Member registration and management
- HATEOAS-compliant with HAL+FORMS media type
- OAuth2 authentication and authorization
- RFC 7807 Problem Details for errors

## Authentication
Most endpoints require OAuth2 authentication. Use the 'Authorize' button to authenticate.

get.summary: List members with pagination and sorting
get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of registered members with summary information (firstName, lastName, registrationNumber). Supports pagination (page, size) and sorting (sort=field,direction). Default: page=0, size=10, sort=lastName,asc. Allowed sort fields: firstName, lastName, registrationNumber. Returns HATEOAS links for navigation including pagination links (first, last, next, prev). Access is restricted to active members only - terminated members will receive 403 Forbidden.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Fulltext search over firstName, lastName, registrationNumber (min 2 chars)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status filter: ACTIVE, INACTIVE, ALL. Non-MANAGE callers are silently forced to ACTIVE.

422.description: Unprocessable entity - cannot remove the last owner of a group

409.description: Conflict - cannot promote a non-member to owner

403.description: Forbidden - user is not an active member

200.description: Paginated list of members retrieved successfully

post.description: Creates a new member with personal information, contact details, and optional guardian information for minors. Automatically generates a unique registration number in format XXXYYSS (club code, birth year, sequence).

get.description:
Returns the current iCal feed token state for the authenticated user.
If a token exists, returns the masked subscribe URL and the timestamp when the token was last set.
The URL is masked — the full raw token is never stored and can only be revealed at generation time.
Use the 'regenerate' affordance (POST) to create or rotate the token and receive the full URL once.
If no token exists, returns url=null.

422.description: Unprocessable entity - cannot remove the last owner of a group

409.description: Conflict - cannot promote a non-member to owner

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

post.summary: Generate or regenerate iCal feed token
post.description:
Generates a new iCal feed token for the authenticated user, or regenerates (rotates) it if one
already exists. The previous subscribe URL immediately stops working.
Returns the full subscribe URL exactly once — it cannot be recovered afterwards.
Store it securely and add it to your calendar application.

422.description: Unprocessable entity - cannot remove the last owner of a group

409.description: Conflict - cannot promote a non-member to owner

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

200.description: New token generated; full subscribe URL returned once

get.summary: List events with pagination and filtering
get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of events.
Supports filtering by status and sorting by various fields.
Default: page=0, size=10, sort=eventDate,desc.
Allowed sort fields: id, name, eventDate, location, organizer, status, registrationDeadline.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Fulltext search on event name and location (optional)

parameters.name: registeredBy
parameters.description: Filter by registration: only 'me' is currently accepted (optional)

parameters.name: dateFrom
parameters.description: Filter events from this date (inclusive, yyyy-MM-dd, optional)

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: Filter events up to this date (inclusive, yyyy-MM-dd, optional)

parameters.name: deadlineWithin
parameters.description: Return events whose nearest future registration deadline falls within [today, today+period] (ISO-8601 duration, e.g. P7D, optional)

parameters.name: notRegisteredBy
parameters.description: Exclude events where the given member is registered: only 'me' is currently accepted (optional)

parameters.name: eventTypeId
parameters.description: Filter by event type UUID (multi-value: ?eventTypeId=x&eventTypeId=y, optional)

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

get.description:
List all registrations for an event.
SI card numbers are not included for privacy protection.
Supported sort fields: firstName, lastName, category, registrationTime.
Default sort: registrationTime ASC.
sort=registrationTime is silently ignored for members without EVENTS:REGISTRATIONS authority
who are not the event coordinator. Unknown sort fields also fall back to default.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field and optional direction, e.g. 'lastName' or 'lastName,desc'

post.description: Synchronises all DRAFT/ACTIVE events with eventDate >= today that have an ORIS ID. Processes each event sequentially; partial failures are collected and returned in the summary. Always returns 200 — check failureCount in the response body.

post.description: Imports multiple ORIS events in a single request. Each event is processed independently; a failure to import one event does not prevent the others from being imported. Always returns 200 — check failureCount in the response body for partial failures.

get.summary: List calendar items with date range filtering
get.description:
Retrieves a list of calendar items filtered by date range.
If dates not provided, defaults to current month.
Maximum date range is 1 year (366 days).
Default sort: startDate,asc. Allowed fields: id, name, startDate, endDate.
When mySchedule=true, returns only EVENT_DATE items linked to events where the current
user is an active participant or event coordinator.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for filtering (ISO DATE format, defaults to first day of current month)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for filtering (ISO DATE format, defaults to last day of current month)

parameters.name: mySchedule
parameters.description: When true, restricts results to EVENT_DATE items for events where the current user is a participant or coordinator

400.description: Date range exceeds 366 days or invalid sort field

422.description: Unprocessable entity - cannot remove the last owner of a group

409.description: Conflict - cannot promote a non-member to owner

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions (editing other member without admin permission, or accessing admin-only fields)

RegisterMemberRequest.description: Member registration data including personal information, contacts, and optional guardian

birthNumber.description: Birth number (rodné číslo) - only for Czech nationals, format RRMMDD/XXXX or RRMMDDXXXX

bankAccountNumber.description: Bank account number (IBAN or domestic Czech format)

ImportBatchRequest.description: Batch import command with list of ORIS event IDs

TokenRequestRequest.description: Request for a new password setup token

TokenRequestResponse.description: Response for password setup token request

message.example: If your account is pending activation, you will receive an email with a new setup link.

SetPasswordRequest.description: Password setup request containing token and new credentials

token.description: The plain text token from email

password.description: The new password (minimum 12 characters with uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character)

passwordConfirmation.description: Password confirmation must match the password field

UpdateMemberRequest.description: Partial update request - only include fields to update

email.description: Member's email address (visible to admins only)

active.description: Whether the member is active (visible to admins only)

KlabisAuth.description: OAuth2 authentication with Klabis Authorization Server
